scripts.test:e2e:restore:owner-paths: playwright test e2e/workspace-restore.spec.ts --grep "restored batch variants remain candidates until explicitly promoted|session turn stack open reopens|session turn stack keeps a single history-open route|active branch continue latest aligns|active branch open latest reopens"
scripts.test:e2e:restore:branch-rename: playwright test e2e/workspace-restore.spec.ts --grep "branch rename updates the active branch label|branch rename reset restores the automatic label"
scripts.test:e2e:restore:provenance: playwright test e2e/workspace-restore.spec.ts --grep "replace imported inherited provenance exposes continuity summary and recovered sources|replace imported live provenance exposes direct grounding summary and multiple sources|provenance panel surfaces attribution overview and uncited sources in the live UI|provenance detail inspector links sources to citation bundles and reuses the selected detail in the composer|provenance detail focus mode narrows linked items and clear selection resets the inspector|provenance bundle compare view shows linked sources side by side and can inspect either source|provenance source compare view shows multiple cited segments and can inspect either bundle"
scripts.test:e2e:restore:replay: playwright test e2e/workspace-restore.spec.ts --grep "session replay reopens imported workflow logs from the workspace snapshot|session replay localizes replay chrome, stage labels, and source actions after import|reload keeps persisted workflow logs available for session replay|session replay current source entry exposes direct source actions"
scripts.test:e2e:restore:queued-batch: playwright test e2e/workspace-restore.spec.ts --grep "queued batch panel restores localized counts, states, and job actions from the workspace snapshot"
scripts.test:e2e:restore:shell-owners: playwright test e2e/workspace-restore.spec.ts --grep "narrow shell owner routes keep actions, advanced settings, and workflow log reachable after import|desktop shell owner layout keeps model output, context rail, and provenance separated after import|dark mode keeps shell owner surfaces readable after import"
scripts.test:e2e:restore:viewer-owners: playwright test e2e/workspace-restore.spec.ts --grep "viewer owner route keeps top rail compact while viewer expands structured output"
scripts.test:e2e:restore:prompt-reuse: playwright test e2e/workspace-restore.spec.ts --grep "structured output prompt reuse updates the composer through append and replace actions"
scripts.test:e2e:restore:mainline-smoke: playwright test e2e/workspace-restore.spec.ts --grep "narrow shell owner routes keep actions, advanced settings, and workflow log reachable after import|desktop shell owner layout keeps model output, context rail, and provenance separated after import|dark mode keeps shell owner surfaces readable after import|viewer owner route keeps top rail compact while viewer expands structured output|structured output prompt reuse updates the composer through append and replace actions|provenance reuse updates the composer through append and replace actions"
scripts.test:e2e:restore:provenance-reuse: playwright test e2e/workspace-restore.spec.ts --grep "provenance reuse updates the composer through append and replace actions"
scripts.test:e2e:restore:regression: playwright test e2e/workspace-restore.spec.ts --grep "restored batch variants remain candidates until explicitly promoted|session turn stack open reopens|session turn stack keeps a single history-open route|active branch continue latest aligns|active branch open latest reopens|branch rename updates the active branch label|branch rename reset restores the automatic label|replace imported inherited provenance exposes continuity summary and recovered sources|replace imported live provenance exposes direct grounding summary and multiple sources|provenance panel surfaces attribution overview and uncited sources in the live UI|provenance detail inspector links sources to citation bundles and reuses the selected detail in the composer|provenance detail focus mode narrows linked items and clear selection resets the inspector|provenance bundle compare view shows linked sources side by side and can inspect either source|provenance source compare view shows multiple cited segments and can inspect either bundle|session replay reopens imported workflow logs from the workspace snapshot|session replay localizes replay chrome, stage labels, and source actions after import|reload keeps persisted workflow logs available for session replay|session replay current source entry exposes direct source actions|queued batch panel restores localized counts, states, and job actions from the workspace snapshot|narrow shell owner routes keep actions, advanced settings, and workflow log reachable after import|desktop shell owner layout keeps model output, context rail, and provenance separated after import|dark mode keeps shell owner surfaces readable after import|viewer owner route keeps top rail compact while viewer expands structured output|structured output prompt reuse updates the composer through append and replace actions|provenance reuse updates the composer through append and replace actions"
